behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the target file (extensions/msteams/src/reply-stream-controller.ts), the factory createTeamsReplyStreamController, methods onPartialReply, preparePayload, finalize, and the isFinalized property — all referenced by tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug (state flag never resets) and required behavior (track finalized, don't re-suppress) without prescribing exact code changes or variable names like pendingFinalize.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check observable behavior (return values, stream.isFinalized timing) rather than specific internal variable names; alternative fixes that reset the flag and finalize eagerly would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the real TypeScript module via Node.js with --experimental-strip-types and call controller methods, inspecting return values and mock stream state.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning undefined always would fail test_stream_received_tokens_reset (second_returned) and a stub returning payload always would fail first_suppressed; the finalize-timing test requires actual stream.finalize() invocation.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover reset behavior, isFinalized guard, eager finalize, and also media/groupChat pass-through mentioned in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section header comments (fail_to_pass / pass_to_pass) and each test has a docstring explaining intent.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce a structured data schema; it fixes a controller method.

no_typos.reason: File paths and API names (preparePayload, onPartialReply, finalize, isFinalized) are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file and method (preparePayload) which is appropriate scope; does not disclose exact buggy line or specific variable like streamReceivedTokens or pendingFinalize.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task with no config edits.
